3105650.name: Chaotic Conundrum
3105650.description:
Chaotic Conundrum is a blazing-fast 2D retro platformer with smooth-as-silk controls, expressive movement options, and tight physics, adorned with a GBA-SNES flair that oozes off the screen, and a rockin' dynamic soundtrack.

Giga-Boy has stolen every single cheeseburger on the planet in a fit of rage, as his pig intestine chowder business unsurprisingly bombed. A 12-year-old cheeseburger enthusiast, Fernan Ricemeat, grabs his reluctant younger sister Frieda and his closest friend Felix to set off on the adventure of a lifetime – only to accidentally destroy all of time and space in the process. Whoops!

Find all the hyper rock shards, kick Giga-Boy's ass, and save burgers before they're history!!

LIGHTS, CHAOS, ACTION!

Sprint, jump, and beat up any baddies you find across a broken world made of lost fragments of time and space, the Rift Cluster. Each level is its own "episode" in which you'll be pit against a new outlandish location. Find a variety of burgers, each with their own special upgrades. Make a mess of things with a dynamic combo system in which the more you wreck, the more you'll gain. In the end, its up to you which route to take, and how you'd like to play – Rush though the world at blistering speeds or explore at your own pace!

FEATURING...

  • Blistering-fast, yet smooth-as-silk gameplay!

  • Wreak havoc in expansive "episodes" across worlds lost in time and space!

  • Dozens of burgers to find, each with their own bonuses!

  • 3 playable characters, each with their own abilities, whom you can swap between on the fly!

  • Fully voiced animated cinematics, tying the story together!

  • Hundreds of achievements to keep you coming back for more!

  • Cosmetics aplenty! No microtransactions, all unlocked in gameplay!

  • Time Attack mode - think you can beat the developers at their own game?

  • Flipped Out mode - Time is constantly ticking! Destroy the level and find everything as fast as possible in order to stay standing!

  • Adjustable difficulty - take it easy or wreck both the world AND your sanity!

  • Obo

Please keep in mind that this game is still in active development. As such, all assets, level designs, and gameplay components are not final and subject to change.
3105650.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*
